LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO AND COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.41. CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.41 REQUIRES A DEFENDANT, BEFORE FILING THE DEMURRER, TO "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" WITH THE PARTY WHO FILED THE COMPLAINT AND TO FILE A DECLARATION STATING THE MEANS BY WHICH THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED. DEFENDANTS SHALL IMMEDIATELY MEET AND CONFER WITH PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DUE NO LATER THAN JANUARY 19, 2021. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-07-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Rudy Martin; 408-779-7904; plaintiff in pro per appearing via Zoom on their own behalf.
Jeremy E. Shulman; Anglin Flewelling & Rasmussen LLP; 626-535-1900; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendant Wells Fargo and Company.

Contested. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO AND COMPANY's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with 30 days leave to amend. Plaintiff's claims are barred by res judicata. Defendant's counsel shall prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Wells Fargo And Company's Demurrer to 1st Amended Complaint is Transferred to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on March 2, 2021, per ex parte order. That department handles all quiet title actions per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2020 Continued To Feb-17-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-21-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO AND COMPANY's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is Off calendar for failure to comply with Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41. Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41 requires a defendant, before filing the demurrer, to "meet and confer in person or by telephone" with the party who filed the complaint and to file a declaration stating the means by which the parties met and conferred. Defendants shall immediately meet and confer with plaintiff. Defendant's response to the first amended complaint is due no later than January 19, 2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
